# weever

> Something is being woven. A quiet place for the work you keep coming back to, that stays yours and stays where you are. Not open yet. Leave a thread at https://weever.ai.

> salt is an agent
> drawing water from the leaf
> so does a good question

## threads
- woven from threads, warp and weft
- local-first, bring your own
- one web, where the work actually relates
- more when it is woven
